---
title: "Anne Duke Pode"
---

## Anne Duke Pode

**Dates:** (c. 1800-22? 25? June 1845)

**Maiden name:** (Yonge)

### Description

paternal aunt of CMY

### Biography

Younger sister of WCY, she married (1830? 1831? Thomas Julian Pode (27 Sept 1799-Feb 1857), who remarried (22 September 1847) Hannah Aspinall [LG 1952 Pode]

### Letters

- Letter from April 19th  [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
